ORDER CONFIRMING ARBITRATION AWARD

LAW AND MOTION 302, RULING: THE COURT ADOPTED THE TENTATIVE RULING. PETITIONER FRANK ZEIDAN'S PETITION TO CONFIRM CONTRACTUAL ARBITRATION AWARD IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. THE RESPONDENT'S REQUEST FOR A CONTINUANCE WAS DENIED BY THE COURT. (MOVING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER.) JUDGE: ERNEST H. calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Confirm Contractual Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Aug-17-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Fortunato Stefano, Tel. 650.458.1647, respondent appearing on his own behalf;
No other appearance.

RULING: The court adopted the tentative ruling. PETITIONER FRANK ZEIDAN's Petition To Confirm Contractual Arbitration Award is Granted. No opposition filed. The respondent's request for a continuance was denied by the court. (Moving party to prepare a form of order.) Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Sherry Sawyer CSR # 5976
